titleStmt.title: SII 9.268: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 268. (A.R. No. 15 of 1917.) ON A PILLAR SET UP AT THE SOUTHERN ENTRANCE OF THE ODDAPPA (SIVA) TEMPLE AT HEMAVATI, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1084, Vṛisha, Pushya, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa corresponding probably to A.D. 1162 December 25 Monday. The date is not verifiable. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya-Chakravarti Vikrama (i.e., Taila III) and mentions his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Mallidēva-Chōḷamahārāja as ruling over Sīre-nāḍu from the capital Heñjeru (modern Hēmāvati). It registers the grant of land made by the Chōḷa chief for the service of the god Dēśīśvaradēva, set up in Heṁjeru by Periyāḷuvaseṭṭi, son of Aḻahiya-Maṇavāḷa and Āṇḍamme, of Ākūru, a brahmadēya in Rājarāja vaḻanāḍu, a subdivision of the Chōḷa country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśra
yaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ para
mabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmaccāḻukyacakravartti vikra
madēvaru sukhasaṁkathāvi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi . svasti samadhiga
tapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍa
ḻēśvaranoṟeyūrapuravarā
dhīśvara karikālacōḻakuḻāṁ
baradyumaṇi pārtthivacūḍā
maṇi harapādārādhaka pa
rabaḷasādhaka Aṟuvattanāla
varu maṁḍaḷikara talegoṇḍaga(ṁ)
ṇḍa . samarapracaṇḍa roddagō
va . khaḻgasādēva . nigaḷaṁkamalla .
bhītaraṁ kolla . Aticaturakāmi
nīkāmadēva . baṁṭarabāva . kā
śyapagōtra kṣatriyapavitra .
nāmādisamastapraśastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ tri
bhuvanamalla mallidēvacōḻa
mahārājaru sīrenāḍa śrīma
drājadhāni heṁjaṟa bīḍinalu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttire dakṣiṇadiśāvara
kaṁ

cōḻadēśadi kāvē
riya teṁkadaḍiya
rājarājavaḻanā
ḍa brahmadēyava
ppa Ākūra . kuṁḍi
negōtrada . śiḍuke
ya Aḻahiya
maṇavāḷarigaṁ
Āṇḍaṁmegaṁ kula
dīpakanāgi puṭṭi
da suputra periyā
ḷuvaseṭṭi heṁjeṟapa
ṭṭaṇadalu yudakadā
nanimittavāgi Agi
dappa bāviyanagaḷisi
tatsamīpadalu sa
masta dēsiyanuma
tadiṁ dēsīśvaradēvara
pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi
sakavarṣa 1084ne
ya vriṣasaṁvatsarada
puṣyamāsada Utta
rāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa
dalu śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ mallidēvacō
ḻamahārājaru dē
sīśvaradēvara nivēdyakkaṁ
nandādīvigegaṁ Aṁgabhō
gakkaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
māḍiyācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭa datti
sivurada modalēri
yalli koṭṭa gadde khaṇḍu
ga mūṟu . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhi
rvvarṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
